hooks.command: f=$(jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // .tool_response.filePath // empty'); if [[ "$f" == /Users/adrianalmeida/Desktop/Enjoyasianrestaurant/pizzeria-gigi/* ]]; then cp /Users/adrianalmeida/Desktop/Enjoyasianrestaurant/pizzeria-gigi/*.html /tmp/pizzeria-gigi/ 2>/dev/null; cp /Users/adrianalmeida/Desktop/Enjoyasianrestaurant/pizzeria-gigi/*.css /tmp/pizzeria-gigi/ 2>/dev/null; cp /Users/adrianalmeida/Desktop/Enjoyasianrestaurant/pizzeria-gigi/*.js /tmp/pizzeria-gigi/ 2>/dev/null; fi
